content: 查询各水位站最新的水位值。
我来查询各水位站的最新水位值。

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/git/hermes-agent/skills/water-resources/lib')
from db import query

sql = """
SELECT r.stcd, s.stnm, s.rvnm, r.tm, r.z, r.q,
       CASE r.wptn WHEN 4 THEN '涨' WHEN 5 THEN '落' WHEN 6 THEN '平' ELSE r.wptn END AS wptn_name,
       f.WRZ, f.GRZ
FROM (
    SELECT stcd, tm, z, q, wptn
    FROM st_river_r
    WHERE tm = (SELECT MAX(tm) FROM st_river_r)
      AND z IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY stcd
) r
JOIN st_stbprp_b s ON r.stcd = s.stcd AND s.sttp IN ('ZZ', 'ZQ', 'RZ')
LEFT JOIN st_rvfcch_b f ON r.stcd = f.STCD
ORDER BY r.z DESC
"""

df = query(sql)
print(f"共查询到 {len(df)} 个水位站")
print("-" * 90)
print(f"{"站码":<10} {"站名":<15} {"河名":<12} {"水位(m)":<10} {"流量(m³/s)":<12} {"水势":<6} {"警戒水位":<10} {"保证水位":<10} {"状态":<10}")
print("-" * 90)
for row in df:
    z = round(row['z'], 2) if row['z'] is not None else 'N/A'
    q = round(row['q'], 2) if row['q'] is not None else 'N/A'
    wrz = round(row['WRZ'], 2) if row['WRZ'] is not None else 'N/A'
    grz = round(row['GRZ'], 2) if row['GRZ'] is not None else 'N/A'
    
    status = '正常'
    if row['z'] is not None:
        if row['GRZ'] is not None and row['z'] > row['GRZ']:
            status = '超保证!'
        elif row['WRZ'] is not None and row['z'] > row['WRZ']:
            status = '超警戒!'
    
    print(f"{row['stcd']:<10} {str(row['stnm']):<15} {str(row['rvnm']) if row['rvnm'] else '-':<12} {str(z):<10} {str(q):<12} {row['wptn_name']:<6} {str(wrz):<10} {str(grz):<10} {status:<10}")"}

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/git/hermes-agent/skills/water-resources/lib')
from db import query

sql = """
SELECT r.stcd, s.stnm, s.rvnm, r.tm, r.z, r.q,
       CASE r.wptn WHEN 4 THEN '涨' WHEN 5 THEN '落' WHEN 6 THEN '平' ELSE COALESCE(CAST(r.wptn AS CHAR), '-') END AS wptn_name,
       f.WRZ, f.GRZ
FROM (
    SELECT stcd, tm, z, q, wptn
    FROM st_river_r
    WHERE tm = (SELECT MAX(tm) FROM st_river_r)
      AND z IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY stcd
) r
JOIN st_stbprp_b s ON r.stcd = s.stcd AND s.sttp IN ('ZZ', 'ZQ', 'RZ')
LEFT JOIN st_rvfcch_b f ON r.stcd = f.STCD
ORDER BY r.z DESC
"""

df = query(sql)
print(f"共查询到 {len(df)} 个水位站，最新数据时间: {df[0]['tm']}")
print("=" * 110)
print(f"{'站码':<12} {'站名':<16} {'所属河流':<12} {'水位(m)':<10} {'流量(m³/s)':<12} {'水势':<6} {'警戒水位':<10} {'保证水位':<10} {'状态':<10}")
print("=" * 110)
for row in df:
    z = round(row['z'], 2) if row['z'] is not None else 'N/A'
    q = round(row['q'], 2) if row['q'] is not None else '-'
    wrz = round(row['WRZ'], 2) if row['WRZ'] is not None else '-'
    grz = round(row['GRZ'], 2) if row['GRZ'] is not None else '-'
    wptn = row['wptn_name'] if row['wptn_name'] else '-'
    rvnm = row['rvnm'] if row['rvnm'] else '-'
    
    status = '正常'
    if row['z'] is not None:
        if row['GRZ'] is not None and row['z'] > row['GRZ']:
            status = '⚠超保证!'
        elif row['WRZ'] is not None and row['z'] > row['WRZ']:
            status = '⚡超警戒!'
    
    print(f"{row['stcd']:<12} {str(row['stnm']):<16} {str(rvnm):<12} {str(z):<10} {str(q):<12} {str(wptn):<6} {str(wrz):<10} {str(grz):<10} {status:<10}")

# 统计
alert_count = sum(1 for r in df if r['z'] is not None and r['WRZ'] is not None and r['z'] > r['WRZ'])
guarantee_count = sum(1 for r in df if r['z'] is not None and r['GRZ'] is not None and r['z'] > r['GRZ'])
normal_count = len(df) - guarantee_count - (alert_count - guarantee_count)

print("=" * 110)
print(f"【统计摘要】")
print(f"  总站点数: {len(df)}")
print(f"  超保证水位: {guarantee_count} 站")
print(f"  超警戒水位: {alert_count - guarantee_count} 站（不含已超保证的）")
print(f"  水位正常:   {normal_count} 站")"}
